title: Elegant Portrait Collage Artwork Vertical Format
sourceTitle: Elegant Portrait Collage Artwork Vertical Format Featuring

imagePrompts.prompt: Elegant portrait collage artwork in vertical format featuring a graceful Japanese woman with natural makeup, soft glowing skin, flowing dark hair, wearing chic contemporary Korean-Japanese fusion fashion. Background built from rounded rectangular windows layered asymmetrically, each containing monochrome editorial-style shots of the same woman laughing, posing, looking away, and walking naturally. The main foreground subject appears in vivid warm colors with cinematic golden-hour lighting, dressed in a luxury cream-and-pink designer outfit with flowing fabric movement. Dreamy editorial mood, sophisticated print design, modern fashion branding aesthetic, soft gradients, glossy paper textures, highly detailed luxury campaign style.
